originalAlarm.description: Undefined or garbage value returned to caller

sanitizedDescription: Undefined or garbage value returned to caller
reasoning: When !CONFIG_IPV6, goto put at L13 bypasses err = -1 at L9, so return err at L17 returns an uninitialized value. // ERROR at L17 confirms this is a VBDB-known bug. When CONFIG_IPV6=T, err is always set to -1 before goto put (nondet()=42 always takes goto), so no bug. PC = CONFIG_NETPOLL is too broad — it includes CONFIG_IPV6=T where the bug does not exist. Should be CONFIG_NETPOLL AND !CONFIG_IPV6. Under-constrained.
